feedback.text: i would like if you could add the when i have bought a game. that i remains my game, so when the game meet it's end of life by the company i have bought it from, that i can if i so wish continue play it. just like if i bought an car, even if the company making the car goes under, then my car still works, ofc there is no updates or spare parts from the original company, but i should have my rigth to if i wish so to repair or buy other spare parts from another 3-partiy service. but rigth now in games, if i buy a game for 80 that require a online connect to a server of the company to play they in my opinion they just stole the game i have payed for as well as used hours on. simple put The EU-Petition Stop Killing Games, is what i wish be add to this
